title: Silky Peruvian Vegetable Stew
description: A sour and velvety Peruvian stew featuring Thai chilli jam, cooked to perfection in a tava-griddle using a bain-marie, perfect for a cozy evening meal.

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, potatoes, and zucchini

instructions: Preheat the tava-griddle over medium heat and brush it with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Add the diced onion to the tava-griddle and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the tava-griddle and cook for an additional 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mixed vegetables to the tava-griddle and cook until they are tender, about 10 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Thai chilli jam, vegetable broth, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the chilli jam mixture over the vegetables in the tava-griddle and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew, covered, for 20 minutes, using a bain-marie to maintain a consistent temperature.
Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro and serve the stew hot.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
